---
title: "Explore My Research"
listing:
  - id: working-papers
    contents:
      - papers/bottled-in-bond.qmd
      - papers/bank-runs.qmd
      - papers/whiskey-markets.qmd
      - papers/absinthe.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    categories: true
    sort: false
    image-height: 160px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description, categories]
  - id: works-in-progress
    contents:
      - papers/prohibition.qmd
      - papers/alms-and-ale.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    sort: false
    image-height: 160px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description, categories]
page-layout: full
---

My research sits at the intersection of historical political economy, public choice, and the political economy of regulation — when regulation serves the public interest, and when it instead protects incumbents or substitutes for order that markets and communities already supply. Browse below, or filter the working papers by topic. Click any card to read more.

## Working Papers

:::{#working-papers}
:::

## Works in Progress

:::{#works-in-progress}
:::
